evals.prompt: How do I set up SmartSenders to provision 20 mailboxes for a new campaign?
evals.expected_output: Guide to bulk mailbox provisioning with warmup requirements and rotation config

assertions.name: smartsenders_guidance
assertions.description: Provides SmartSenders setup steps for bulk mailbox provisioning via Gmail/Outlook OAuth or SMTP

assertions.name: warmup_dependency
assertions.description: Stresses that Ultra Premium Warmup must run 2-3 weeks on new mailboxes before campaign rotation

assertions.name: mailbox_rotation
assertions.description: Explains mailbox rotation configuration and per-sender daily limits (30-50 emails/day per mailbox)

evals.prompt: I want to connect Smartlead to Salesforce
evals.expected_output: Explains that Salesforce integration is via OutboundSync (not native) and provides alternatives

assertions.name: outboundsync
assertions.description: Clarifies that Smartlead-Salesforce integration is via OutboundSync, a paid third-party connector — not native like HubSpot

assertions.name: alternative_via_zapier
assertions.description: Mentions Zapier as an alternative integration method for Salesforce

assertions.name: integration_skill_pointer
assertions.description: Points to /sales-integration for broader integration architecture help

evals.prompt: Use the Smartlead API to add leads to a campaign from our CRM
evals.expected_output: API guidance for lead import with authentication and endpoint details

assertions.name: api_reference_pointer
assertions.description: Points to references/smartlead-api-reference.md for full API docs

assertions.name: auth_method
assertions.description: Explains API key authentication via api_key query parameter

assertions.name: endpoint_identification
assertions.description: Identifies POST /campaigns/{id}/leads as the endpoint for adding leads with email required and custom_fields for merge variables
